comment.body:
> that it is setting for a top. 5643.31 is the primarly target. Big time weekly lvl. For ES it is 5606.47; with 5689.25 margin of error (high vol)
Today's price action will confirm or disprove yesterday's breakout. This is key. Old-school style. Until it is confirmed, this is simply a breakout of the line. If weekly can stay above the Apr 9/10 highs, squeeze up is very much likely coming. They investors use the strenghts to cover loses and pull more money out.
Then supply-chain issues will come from next week (headlines), aiming around May 4-6, investors keep withdrawing money from the market.
Primal downside target is 4956.95 then 4802; if this is taken out 4380.73, and even 3996.42 comes.
